symptom: AVD management portal shows 'Failed to create registration key' error
rootCause: Registration token creation failed, possibly due to too long expiry time
solution: Retry creating registration key with shorter expiry time (between 1 hour and 1 month)

symptom: Cannot add user assignments to application group - Azure portal shows 'Session Ending' or 'Experiencing Authentication Issues' warning
rootCause: Conditional Access policy 'Microsoft Office 365 Data Storage Terms of Use' blocks token acquisition for Microsoft Graph; user hasn't accepted Terms of Use via SharePoint
solution: Admin must first sign in to SharePoint and accept Terms of Use before accessing Azure portal

symptom: User-assigned managed identity assigned to host pool does not appear in managed identity's associated resources view
rootCause: Bug in host pool API - accepts identity ID even if missing leading '/' in the resource path
solution: Double-check the user-assigned managed identity ID format, ensure it starts with '/' (e.g., '/subscriptions/...')

symptom: RDAgentBootLoader or Remote Desktop Agent Loader stopped running on session host; session host shows Unavailable
rootCause: Boot loader unable to install agent properly; agent service not running
solution: Start Remote Desktop Agent Loader service via Services console. If it stops after restart, check for INVALID_REGISTRATION_TOKEN or EXPIRED_MACHINE_TOKEN errors

symptom: Event ID 3277 with INVALID_REGISTRATION_TOKEN or EXPIRED_MACHINE_TOKEN in Application event log; session host cannot register
rootCause: Registration key is expired or invalid
solution: Generate new registration key, update registry (HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\RDInfraAgent - set IsRegistered=0, set new RegistrationToken), restart RDAgentBootLoader service

symptom: Event ID 3277 with INVALID_FORM - agent cannot connect to broker
rootCause: Firewall or DNS settings blocking broker endpoints (BrokerResourceIdURI and BrokerResourceIdURIGlobal)
solution: Verify connectivity to broker endpoints by checking registry keys under HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\RDInfraAgent and testing {BrokerURI}/api/health. Unblock required URLs per Safe URL List. Also check TLS 1.2 cipher compatibility

symptom: Event ID 3703 - 'RD Gateway Url is not accessible'; agent unable to reach gateway URLs
rootCause: Firewall or proxy blocking required AVD gateway URLs
solution: Unblock required URLs from Safe URL List. Run Required URL Check tool. For Azure Firewall, configure per AVD deployment protection guide

symptom: Event ID 3019 - agent can't reach web socket transport URLs
rootCause: Network blocking web socket transport URLs required by AVD
solution: Unblock URLs from Safe URL List. Check network trace logs to identify where AVD service is blocked. Work with networking team on firewall/proxy/DNS settings

symptom: Event ID 3277 with InstallationHealthCheckFailedException - stack listener not working
rootCause: Terminal server toggled registry key for stack listener, disabling it
solution: Check if stack listener is working; if not, manually uninstall and reinstall the stack component

symptom: Event ID 3277 with ENDPOINT_NOT_FOUND - broker can't find endpoint to connect
rootCause: No active session host VMs in host pool, or all exceeded max session limit, or agent service not running
solution: Verify VM is powered on and not removed from host pool; check max session limit not exceeded; ensure agent service running and stack listener working; verify valid registration token

symptom: Event ID 3277 with InstallMsiException - agent installer fails
rootCause: Another MSI installer already running, or Group Policy blocking msiexec.exe (Windows Installer > Turn off Windows Installer = Enabled)
solution: Wait for other installer to finish, or check RSOP for 'Turn off Windows Installer' policy under Computer Config > Admin Templates > Windows Components > Windows Installer and work with AD team to allow msiexec.exe

symptom: Event ID 3389 with MissingMethodException during agent update - agent reverts to earlier version
rootCause: .NET Framework version installed on VM is lower than 4.7.2
solution: Upgrade .NET Framework to version 4.7.2 or later

symptom: Session host VMs stuck in Upgrading or Unavailable state
rootCause: Agent or side-by-side stack didn't install successfully
solution: Reinstall SxS network stack: stop RDAgentBootLoader, uninstall SxS Network Stack, reinstall latest from C:\Program Files\Microsoft RDInfra\SxSStack*.msi, restart VM, verify qwinsta shows rdp-tcp and rdp-sxs in Listen state

symptom: NAME_ALREADY_REGISTERED error when registering session host
rootCause: Session host VM name is a duplicate of an existing registration
solution: Remove session host from host pool, create new VM with unique name, re-register

symptom: RDAgentBootLoader startup timeout at OS boot - session host shows Needs Assistance or Unavailable; Event 7000/7011 in Service Control Manager
rootCause: Boot loader service doesn't start fast enough during OS boot due to boot pressure (high IOPS, heavy GPO, AV scans)
solution: Set RDAgentBootLoader to Automatic (Delayed Start); increase ServicesPipeTimeout registry to 60000ms; verify boot performance and IOPS; run WVDAgentUrlTool.exe to validate endpoints

symptom: Stack listener not working on Windows 10 2004 - rdp-tcp/rdp-sxs not in Listen state
rootCause: Registry keys fReverseConnectMode or fEnableWinStation not set to 1 under HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Terminal Server\WinStations
solution: Set fReverseConnectMode=1 and fEnableWinStation=1 in registry for matching stack version folder, restart VM, verify SessionDirectoryListener matches rdp-sxs version

symptom: DownloadMsiException - agent fails to download/install
rootCause: Insufficient disk space on session host VM for RDAgent installation
solution: Free up disk space by deleting unused files or increase storage capacity of session host VM

symptom: DisableRegistryTools registry key prevents agent from installing SxS stack - installMSIException; session hosts stuck Unavailable
rootCause: DisableRegistryTools=1 set in HKU\DEFAULT, HKU\S-1-5-18, or HKCU policies preventing registry operations
solution: Remove DisableRegistryTools key from all three locations, uninstall affected SxS stack, remove its registry keys, restart VM, let agent auto-install SxS stack

symptom: AD DS group membership for VM not working for Azure Files authentication
rootCause: VM needs to be restarted to activate new AD DS group membership
solution: Restart the VM after adding it to the AD DS group

symptom: Cannot add storage account to AD DS domain
rootCause: Incorrect OU syntax or ignored warning messages during PowerShell account creation
solution: Delete domain account representing storage account, recreate with correct OU syntax: DC=ouname,DC=domainprefix,DC=topleveldomain. Wait 30min for Entra ID sync

symptom: New-AzRoleAssignment fails with 'does not map to an AD object ID'
rootCause: User specified in -SignInName not found in Microsoft Entra ID; user not synced, or is B2C/B2B user
solution: Ensure user is synced to Entra ID, not B2C/B2B, and AVD environment is tied to correct Entra ID tenant

symptom: New-AzWvdHostPool fails with 'location is not available for resource type'
rootCause: AVD service metadata location not available in selected region (e.g. southeastasia)
solution: Use one of the supported regions listed in the error message for host pool creation

symptom: New-AzWvdApplicationGroup fails with 'must be in same location as associated HostPool'
rootCause: Application group being created in different location than the host pool
solution: Retrieve host pool location and create application group in the same location. All associated objects (host pool, app group, workspace) must share the same metadata location

symptom: Entra joined VM: 'Your account is configured to prevent you from using this device'
rootCause: User account not assigned Virtual Machine User Login RBAC role on the VM
solution: Assign Virtual Machine User Login role to user on the VM or resource group

symptom: Entra joined VM: 'The user name or password is incorrect' despite correct credentials
rootCause: Per-user MFA enabled/enforced (not supported for Entra joined VMs), or VM User Login role not assigned, or Conditional Access requiring MFA for Azure Windows VM Sign-In app
solution: Disable per-user MFA; use Conditional Access instead with exclusion for Azure Windows VM Sign-In. Assign VM User Login role. Check AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs with AppId 372140e0-b3b7-4226-8ef9-d57986796201

symptom: Entra joined VM: 'The logon attempt failed' on Windows Security credential prompt
rootCause: Device not Entra joined/hybrid joined to same tenant, or PKU2U protocol not enabled on local PC and/or session host
solution: Ensure device is Entra joined/hybrid joined to same tenant. Enable PKU2U protocol on both local PC and session host. Disable per-user MFA

symptom: Entra joined VM: 'A specified logon session does not exist. It may already have been terminated'
rootCause: Kerberos server object not properly created/configured for SSO
solution: Verify Kerberos server object is properly created and configured per SSO configuration guide

symptom: Session host fails UrlsAccessibleCheck health check - stuck in Needs Assistance state
rootCause: Firewall blocking outbound traffic to required URLs, or local hosts file blocking required websites
solution: Add firewall rule allowing outbound TCP 80/443 to required URLs. Check Hosts file (path in registry HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\Tcpip\Parameters\DataBasePath) for blocked entries

symptom: Session host fails MetaDataServiceCheck health check - can't access IMDS endpoint
rootCause: Networking/firewall/proxy blocking IMDS endpoint 169.254.169.254
solution: Unblock IP 169.254.169.254; ensure HTTP clients bypass web proxy for IMDS; add proxy bypass: netsh winhttp set proxy bypass-list='169.254.169.254'

symptom: Session host fails MonitoringAgentCheck - Geneva Agent not functioning
rootCause: Remote Desktop Services Infrastructure Geneva Agent not installed, has multiple versions, or GenevaTask scheduled task not running
solution: Verify Geneva Agent installed (check Apps & Features); uninstall older versions keeping only latest; check C:\Program Files\Microsoft RDInfra\GenevaInstall.txt for errors; verify GenevaTask_<version> scheduled task is enabled and running; reinstall from .msi if needed

symptom: Custom image template build fails with Resource group must be empty error
rootCause: Specified resource group for Azure Image Builder contains existing resources
solution: Delete all resources in the resource group or specify a new empty one

symptom: Custom image template fails with Resource URI is unavailable error
rootCause: Script URI is not publicly accessible or URL is incorrect
solution: Verify script URI is publicly available

symptom: Custom image template fails with Hyper-V generation mismatch between source image and Compute Gallery definition
rootCause: Source image Gen1/Gen2 does not match Compute Gallery VM image definition generation
solution: Ensure source image generation matches VM image definition generation

symptom: Custom image template fails with PrivateLinkService Network Policy not disabled for subnet
rootCause: Private service policy enabled on subnet used by Azure Image Builder
solution: Disable private service policy on the subnet

symptom: Custom image template fails with ContainerInstance authorization error
rootCause: Microsoft.ContainerInstance resource provider not registered
solution: Register Microsoft.ContainerInstance resource provider on the subscription

symptom: WebAuthn redirection not working - no Windows Hello or security key option in AVD session
rootCause: FIDO2 method not enabled in Entra ID, or user signed in single-factor, or unsupported OS
solution: Enable FIDO2 in Entra ID; use Sign in with Windows Hello option; verify supported OS

symptom: Clipboard redirection fails or window cannot be resized after SxS Network Stack update 1.0.2501.05600+
rootCause: rdpclipcdv.exe and rdpinputcdv.exe blocked by AppLocker/SRP/endpoint protection
solution: Allow-list rdpclipcdv.exe and rdpinputcdv.exe from C:\Program Files\Microsoft RDInfra subfolders

symptom: Azure portal shows Create a free account when accessing AVD
rootCause: No active subscriptions or account lacks view permissions
solution: Sign in with Contributor-level access account

symptom: Host pool deployment fails with Exceeding quota limit
rootCause: VM core quota exceeded for SKU in subscription/region
solution: Create host pool with fewer VMs or submit quota increase request

symptom: User assignments not visible after moving subscription between Entra tenants
rootCause: Old assignments tied to previous tenant
solution: Reassign users to application groups in new tenant

symptom: Azure region not visible when selecting AVD service object location
rootCause: Microsoft.DesktopVirtualization resource provider needs re-registration
solution: Re-register Microsoft.DesktopVirtualization resource provider

symptom: Host pool deployment fails with joindomain error
rootCause: Incorrect credentials, domain not resolvable, or VNet DNS set to Default
solution: Verify credentials; peer VNets; set DNS to Custom pointing to DC IPs

symptom: Deployment fails Unauthorized - scale operation not allowed for subscription in region
rootCause: Subscription type (MSDN/Free/Education) lacks VM features in region
solution: Change subscription type or deploy to different region

symptom: DSC extension fails to download Configuration.zip - catalogartifact.azureedge.net not resolved
rootCause: Firewall/NSG/static route blocking download
solution: Remove blocking network rules or download zip manually

symptom: Cannot delete session host from host pool after VM deleted
rootCause: Session host record must be deleted before VM
solution: Drain mode then sign out users then delete session host then delete VM

symptom: MMR extension shows not loaded in first browser tab
rootCause: Known initialization issue in first tab
solution: Open a second browser tab

symptom: Multimedia redirection does not work on session host
rootCause: cmd.exe is blocked; MMR requires it
solution: Unblock cmd.exe on session hosts

symptom: MMR extension version disappears, fails to load on supported sites
rootCause: Missing latest Visual C++ Redistributable
solution: Install latest Visual C++ Redistributable

symptom: ShortpathTransportNetworkDrop error in Log Analytics - UDP connection drops
rootCause: UDP has no RST mechanism; loss detected only by timeout
solution: Use avdnettest.exe to verify STUN/TURN connectivity and NAT type

symptom: ConnectionBrokenMissedHeartbeatThresholdExceeded - RDP timeout before UDP timeout
rootCause: RDP heartbeat timeout misconfiguration
solution: Review RDP heartbeat timeout settings

symptom: User connects but no feed/icons displayed in AVD
rootCause: Not assigned to app groups, cached creds, or distribution group instead of security group
solution: Check Get-AzRoleAssignment; clear cache; use security groups

symptom: User loses feed after subscription moved between Entra tenants
rootCause: Assignments tied to old tenant or CSP transfer
solution: Reassign users; re-register DesktopVirtualization RP for CSP

symptom: Conditional Access error prevents AVD access
rootCause: CA policy blocks AVD/W365 apps or Windows Cloud Login app for SSO
solution: Update CA policies to allow AVD and W365 apps; allow Windows Cloud Login for SSO

symptom: Session host config fails during host pool creation - VmSkuNotAvailableInRegion etc
rootCause: Incompatible VM SKU/region/zone/disk/image/VNet combination
solution: Use Get-AzComputeResourceSku; use PowerShell cmdlet or recreate host pool

symptom: Session host update fails and rollback fails - host unavailable
rootCause: Image/SKU mismatch, agent failure, resource locks, or resource modifications during update
solution: Check errors; retry or cancel; remove DSC extension from image; check activity logs

symptom: Domain join fails with Timeout waiting for user input
rootCause: Domain join account has MFA enabled
solution: Remove MFA or use service account

symptom: Computer account reuse blocked during domain join - KB5020276 hardening
rootCause: Oct 2022+ Windows updates enforce join hardening; insufficient permissions
solution: Use original creator account, Domain Admin, or apply computer account re-use GPO

symptom: AVD Agent and Boot Loader not installed; ScriptLog.log missing
rootCause: PowerShell DSC failed - wrong credentials or insufficient permissions
solution: Manually install via PowerShell; verify admin access and no MFA

symptom: O_REVERSE_CONNECT_STACK_FAILURE error - SxS stack not installed
rootCause: Side-by-side stack not installed on session host VM
solution: RDP as local admin and reinstall SxS stack via host pool registration

symptom: Remote Desktop licensing mode not configured - RDS will stop working in X days
rootCause: Missing Windows updates or GPO Set the Remote Desktop licensing mode is Enabled
solution: Disable the licensing mode GPO; install KB4516077 for 1809 or redeploy with latest image

symptom: Could not connect to remote PC because of a security error
rootCause: Allow log on through Remote Desktop Services policy misconfigured
solution: Fix the security policy to include appropriate user groups

symptom: Golden image causes agent issues - agent pre-installed in image
rootCause: Golden image contains pre-installed AVD agent
solution: Never include AVD agent in golden images; install after deployment

symptom: Ephemeral OS disk deployment fails on certain VM sizes
rootCause: VM size does not have enough local cache or temporary disk space to accommodate the OS image
solution: Verify VM size supports EOSD using Azure CLI EphemeralOSDiskSupported check; for AVD use Temp Disk placement (NVMe not supported in public preview)

symptom: OS-level changes lost after stopping/deallocating/reimaging VM with ephemeral OS disk
rootCause: Ephemeral OS disks are stateless; stop/deallocate operations wipe OS state by design
solution: Avoid stop/deallocate operations; design stateless workloads; persist user profiles externally via FSLogix or Azure Files; use delete/recreate logic for autoscale instead of deallocate

symptom: Snapshots, backups, or Azure Disk Encryption not available on ephemeral OS disk
rootCause: Ephemeral OS disks do not support persistent features (snapshots, backups, encryption) by design
solution: Use managed OS disks instead of EOSD if persistent features like backups, snapshots, or encryption are required

symptom: Ephemeral OS disk deployment fails with incorrect DiffDiskPlacement (e.g. NVMe selected)
rootCause: Selecting unsupported placement option such as NVMe causes deployment issues during public preview
solution: For AVD session hosts, select Temp Disk placement during deployment; avoid NVMe placement during public preview

symptom: Ephemeral OS disk deployment fails in certain regions due to SKU rollout gaps
rootCause: Incomplete rollout of supported SKUs or backend bugs cause regional deployment issues
solution: Monitor Azure announcements for SKU availability updates; deploy to another region or select a different SKU as workaround

symptom: Windows key remains held in local session after pressing Ctrl+Win+L for live captions in AVD remote session and returning to local desktop
rootCause: Known Windows limitation: when using Win key, certain key combinations are locked to prevent overriding Win+L; releasing Win key last after Ctrl+Win+L causes Win key to stay held in local session
solution: Release L or Win key before the Ctrl key when pressing Ctrl+Win+L; alternatively start live captions from the Start menu instead of keyboard shortcut
